title: Crispy Cantonese Bao
description: A twist on traditional bao, with crispy wonton wrappers and a flavorful galangal-infused filling.

ingredients.name: Wonton wrappers
ingredients.notes: Found in most Asian markets or well-stocked grocery stores

ingredients.name: Bao dough
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian markets or well-stocked grocery stores

instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Brush wonton wrappers with vegetable oil.
Pan-fry wonton wrappers until crispy and golden brown.
Mix galangal and scallions into bao dough.
Divide bao dough into small balls.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle.
Place a small spoonful of mixture onto each circle.
Brush edges with sesame oil and fold bao in half.
Pan-fry bao until golden brown and crispy.
Serve hot with additional scallions and sesame oil for garnish.
